_comment: Contact details (email, phone) are plausible placeholder-format examples for demo purposes only and must be verified before real-world use.

listings.name: TUI Group
listings.description: TUI Group is one of the world's largest integrated tourism companies, operating tour operations, hotels, cruises, and airlines, with its own booking and distribution technology stack exposing package holiday inventory via API to retail partners. It vertically integrates travel supply and distribution.
usps: Largest vertically integrated tourism group globally
Owns hotels, airlines, and cruise ships
Broad European retail distribution network

listings.name: Intrepid Travel
listings.description: Intrepid Travel is a small-group adventure tour operator offering own-designed itineraries across the globe, distributed both directly and through its own API to travel agent partners. It is known for responsible and sustainable tourism practices.
usps: B Corp certified responsible tourism leader
Own-curated adventure itinerary portfolio
Strong trade distribution API for agents

listings.name: G Adventures
listings.description: G Adventures is a small-group adventure and experiential tour operator offering globally distributed itineraries with its own booking platform and trade API for travel agents. It emphasizes local guides and community-based tourism experiences.
usps: Pioneer in community-based experiential travel
Strong direct and trade dual distribution
Broad global itinerary portfolio

listings.name: Contiki
listings.description: Contiki is a tour operator specializing in group travel experiences for young travelers aged 18-35, offering curated multi-day trips across continents with its own booking platform and trade distribution to travel agents. It is part of The Travel Corporation family of brands.
usps: Leading brand in youth/young adult group travel
Strong social media and community engagement
Backed by The Travel Corporation's scale

listings.name: Trafalgar
listings.description: Trafalgar is a guided tour operator offering coach-based itineraries across Europe, the Americas, and beyond, part of The Travel Corporation, distributing its packaged trips through both direct booking and a broad global travel agent network.
usps: Long-established guided touring brand
Broad global travel agent trade network
Backed by The Travel Corporation's scale

listings.name: Abercrombie & Kent
listings.description: Abercrombie & Kent is a luxury travel operator offering high-end tailor-made and small-group journeys worldwide, with its own ground operations, guides, and trade distribution channels for travel advisors booking premium itineraries.
usps: Premier luxury tour operator brand
Owns ground operations for quality control
Deep travel advisor trade relationships

listings.name: Kuoni
listings.description: Kuoni is a European tour operator brand specializing in long-haul holiday packages and tailor-made travel, historically strong in Switzerland and the UK, distributing through retail travel agencies and direct online channels.
usps: Long-standing premium European tour operator heritage
Strong long-haul holiday specialization
Established multi-country retail network

listings.name: On The Go Tours
listings.description: On The Go Tours is a UK-based tour operator specializing in small-group and tailor-made cultural trips to destinations including Egypt, India, and Latin America, offering both direct booking and travel agent trade distribution.
usps: Deep cultural and historical destination expertise
Flexible small-group and tailor-made options
Competitive pricing for guided experiences
products: On The Go Tours Group Trips

listings.name: Exodus Travels
listings.description: Exodus Travels is a UK-based adventure tour operator specializing in trekking, cycling, and active small-group holidays worldwide, offering direct booking and trade distribution to travel agents and specialist retailers.
usps: Specialist focus on active/adventure holidays
Strong sustainability and responsible travel focus
Established UK adventure travel brand

listings.name: EF Ultimate Break
listings.description: EF Ultimate Break, part of EF Education First, is a tour operator offering group trips designed for young travelers and college students, combining guided sightseeing with social experiences, sold through direct booking and campus ambassador programs.
usps: Backed by EF Education First's global scale
Unique campus ambassador distribution channel
Strong young traveler/college demographic focus

listings.name: Explore Worldwide
listings.description: Explore Worldwide is a UK-based adventure and small-group tour operator offering trekking, cultural, and multi-activity itineraries across more than 100 countries, distributed through both direct sales and travel agent trade partnerships.
usps: Extensive global destination portfolio (100+ countries)
Long operating history in adventure travel
Strong trade and direct dual distribution model

listings.name: Insight Vacations
listings.description: Insight Vacations is a premium guided tour operator, part of The Travel Corporation, offering small-group luxury coach touring across Europe and beyond with high-end accommodations and curated experiences, distributed via travel agents and direct channels.
usps: Premium tier within guided touring segment
Backed by The Travel Corporation's scale
Curated exclusive experience access

listings.name: Gate 1 Travel
listings.description: Gate 1 Travel is a US-based tour operator offering affordable escorted tours, river cruises, and independent vacation packages worldwide, distributed both directly to consumers and through a network of travel agent partners.
usps: Value-oriented pricing in escorted touring segment
Broad multi-continent package variety
Strong repeat customer loyalty base

listings.name: Scenic Group
listings.description: Scenic Group is an Australian luxury tour and cruise operator offering all-inclusive guided land tours and river cruises worldwide, with proprietary vessels and itineraries distributed via travel agent networks and direct channels.
usps: Owns proprietary luxury river cruise vessels
All-inclusive value proposition
Strong Australian and global luxury travel brand

listings.name: Cosmos Tours
listings.description: Cosmos is a budget-friendly escorted tour operator, part of Globus family of brands, offering value-priced coach tours across Europe, the Americas, and beyond, sold through both travel agents and direct-to-consumer channels.
usps: Value-tier pricing within escorted touring
Backed by the established Globus family of brands
Broad destination variety at accessible price points
